parameterEditor.empty: No parameters defined. Add a parameter to specify what data this tool needs.
parameterEditor.nameHelp: Name of the parameter, like "order_id" or "customer_name"
parameterEditor.typeHelp: Type of the parameter, like "string" or "number" or "boolean"
parameterEditor.descriptionHelp: Description of the parameter, which makes it easy for LLM to understand, like "The ID of the Customer to fetch Order Details"
parameterEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this parameter is for...

presetParameterEditor.empty: No preset parameters defined. Add one to inject a fixed value or workflow context into the request.
presetParameterEditor.nameHelp: Key sent to the API, like "phone_number" or "customer_id"
presetParameterEditor.typeHelp: JSON type to send to the API
presetParameterEditor.valueHelp: Use a fixed value or a template like {example1} or {example2}

createCredential.title: Add Credential
createCredential.description: Create a new credential for authentication.

filters.title: Filter Workflow Runs
filters.description: Build custom filters to find specific workflow runs

phoneNumber.dialogDescription: PSTN numbers (E.164), SIP URIs (sip:user@host), and SIP extensions are all supported.
phoneNumber.addressImmutable: Address cannot be changed. Delete this number and create a new one to change it.
phoneNumber.inboundWorkflowHelp: Used when per-number inbound routing is enabled. Today, inbound calls still route by the workflow_id in the webhook URL.
phoneNumber.defaultCallerId: Default caller ID for this configuration
phoneNumber.defaultCallerIdHelp: Used as the from-number for test calls when set.

toast.syncFailed: Saved, but failed to sync inbound webhook to the provider.

errors.pstnNeedsCountry: PSTN addresses without a leading '+' need a Country (ISO-2) hint, or include the country code in the address (e.g. +14155551234).

config.addDescription: Connect a telephony provider account. Phone numbers are added after the configuration is created.
config.editDescription: Update credentials for this configuration. Phone numbers are managed separately.
config.providerLocked: Provider cannot be changed after creation.
config.setDefaultOutbound: Set as default for outbound calls
config.setDefaultOutboundHelp: Used by test calls and campaigns when no specific config is selected.
config.phoneNumbersManagedSeparately: Phone numbers are managed separately on the configuration page.
